summary: Standalone-domain migration implemented repo-side for callofdoodie.wtf canonical and playcallofdoodie.com redirect hedge.
Cloudflare Pages root build support, Pages workflow, Pages security headers, and runtime-scoped service worker shipped.
Canonical metadata, manifest, OG image, launch copy, score-card share URL, menu share URL, and challenge-link URLs updated to callofdoodie.wtf.
Reusable Cloudflare/Namecheap cutover scripts added for this and future project domain migrations.
Root build deployed successfully to Cloudflare Pages at https://a660c406.call-of-doodie.pages.dev/.

validation.tests: src/utils/challengeLinks.test.js: 2/2 passing under forked Vitest; App.launch.test.jsx observed passing in full forked run after timeout increase
validation.build: npm run build: clean; VITE_BASE_PATH=/call-of-doodie/ npm run build: clean
validation.notes: Default/threaded Vitest invocations showed Windows runner timeout variance; forked targeted coverage passed.

next: Create/store CLOUDFLARE_ZONE_CREATE_TOKEN or manually add Cloudflare zones for callofdoodie.wtf and playcallofdoodie.com.
Switch Namecheap nameservers to the Cloudflare-assigned NS pair and update Namecheap API IP allowlist.
Run domain cutover scripts, attach custom domains, configure redirects, and verify canonical + backup domains.
If membership matters for launch, implement Supabase Auth per docs/AUTH_INTEGRATION_PLAN.md.
blockers: Stored Cloudflare token lacks com.cloudflare.api.account.zone.create permission.
Custom apex domains still resolve through Namecheap parking DNS until zones exist and nameservers are switched.
Namecheap API automation requires current public IP in allowlist.
